Reviews Contact

About Onyx Solar

12+ years serving San Diego and surrounding areas

Founded by local engineers who saw the need for solar solutions tailored to coastal corrosion and inland wildfire risks, Onyx Solar brings grid independence to San Diego homes.

We combine German-engineered components with California craftsmanship, ensuring every installation withstands salt air, earthquakes, and our intense UV exposure.

As active members of the San Diego Green Building Council, we're committed to making renewable energy accessible across all neighborhoods.

12+ Years in Business
800+ Projects Completed
97% Client Satisfaction
20+ Team Members
Onyx Solar

Trusted solar professionals serving San Diego, CA and the surrounding areas. Quality work, honest pricing, guaranteed satisfaction.

555-sol-r93
